def negative_multiprocessing_pool_created_without_context_manager_or_terminate():
    rule_id = "multiprocessing_pool_created_without_context_manager_or_terminate"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "multiprocessing.Pool created without a context manager or explicit .terminate() call, leaking worker processes."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
